channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HMAAGRO] Promoters of HMA Agro Industries Ltd Propose to Sell 6.63% Shares via Stock Exchange Mechanism
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Zulfiqar Ahmad Qurashi, Mohammad Ashraf Qureshi, Mohammad Mehmood Qureshi, Gulzar Ahmad and Wajid Ahmed (the Sellers/Promoters) propose to sell up to 3,31,81,173 Equity Shares of HMA Agro Industries Ltd through the Stock Exchange Mechanism. The sale will take place on Thursday, April 09, 2026, for non-Retail Investors and on Friday, April 10, 2026, for Retail Investors and non-Retail Investors who choose to carry forward their unallotted bids from T day. The allocation will be at or above the Floor Price on a price priority basis.

  • Promoters of HMA Agro Industries Ltd propose to sell shares via Stock Exchange Mechanism
  • Sale of up to 3,31,81,173 Equity Shares representing approximately 6.63% of the total issued and paid-up equity share capital
  • Sale to take place on April 09, 2026, for non-Retail Investors and on April 10, 2026, for Retail Investors
  • Allocation will be at or above the Floor Price on a price priority basis
  • SEBI OFS Circular, BSE Operational Guidelines and OFS Guidelines to be followed

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HMA Agro Industries Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [DEEPAKCHEM] Deepak Chemtex Ltd Clarifies on Price Movement with No Additional Information
item.description:
Deepak Chemtex Ltd has clarified a recent price movement of their security at the stock exchange. According to the company, there is no additional information or announcement that may have a bearing on the price/volume behavior of the company's scrip. The company's management is not connected with the increase in price/volume of the company's scrip, which is purely market-driven. The company has been regularly disseminating price-sensitive information as required.

  • Deepak Chemtex Ltd clarifies price movement with no additional information
  • Price/volume behavior of the company's scrip is market-driven
  • Company's management not connected with the increase in price/volume
  • Regular dissemination of price-sensitive information by the company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Deepak Chemtex Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PFS] PTC India Financial Services Ltd Appoints Shri Rajiv Malhotra as an Additional Director
item.description:
PTC India Financial Services Ltd has appointed Shri Rajiv Malhotra as an Additional Director in the category of Nominee Director. The appointment was made at the Board of Directors meeting held on 8th April 2026. Malhotra, aged about 59 years, is a Mechanical engineer by training and has undergone the Post Graduate Program (PGP) in Management. He has been in position as Executive Director & Group Chief Risk Officer since June, 2013 in PTC India Ltd. He is also a Nominee of PTC India Limited.

  • PTC India Financial Services Ltd has appointed Shri Rajiv Malhotra as an Additional Director.
  • Malhotra is a Mechanical engineer by training and has undergone the Post Graduate Program (PGP) in Management.
  • He has been in position as Executive Director & Group Chief Risk Officer since June, 2013 in PTC India Ltd.
  • Malhotra is a Nominee of PTC India Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PTC INDIA FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PFS] PTC India Financial Services Ltd Appoints Shri Rajiv Malhotra as Additional Director
item.description:
PTC India Financial Services Ltd has appointed Shri Rajiv Malhotra as an Additional Director in the category of Nominee Director, following the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. Malhotra, aged about 59 years, is a Mechanical engineer and an alumnus of NIT, Kurukshetra and Indian Institute of Management, Lucknow. He has over 35 years of experience in the utility and energy sector and is currently serving as Executive Director & Group Chief Risk Officer at PTC India Ltd. His appointment is effective from 8th April 2026.

  • PTC India Financial Services Ltd appoints Shri Rajiv Malhotra as Additional Director.
  • Malhotra is a Mechanical engineer with over 35 years of experience in the utility and energy sector.
  • He is currently serving as Executive Director & Group Chief Risk Officer at PTC India Ltd.
  • Malhotra's appointment is effective from 8th April 2026.
  • He is a Nominee Director from PTC India Limited, the holding company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PTC INDIA FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar Subsidiary Commissions 4 MW of 100 MW Wind Power Project in Gujarat
item.description:
ACME Solar Holdings Ltd. has announced the commissioning of an additional 4 MW out of the 100 MW wind power project in Gujarat by its subsidiary, ACME Eco Clean Energy Private Limited. This brings the total commissioned capacity to 96 MW. The commissioning has been confirmed by Gujarat Energy Development Agency and Paschim Gujarat Vij Company Limited officials, with formal certification expected shortly.

  • ACME Solar Holdings Ltd.'s subsidiary commissions 4 MW of a 100 MW wind power project in Gujarat.
  • The commissioning has been confirmed by Gujarat Energy Development Agency and Paschim Gujarat Vij Company Limited officials.
  • The total commissioned capacity now stands at 96 MW out of 100 MW.
  • Formal certification is awaited from the relevant authorities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: Commissioning

item.title: [KFINTECH] KFin Technologies Ltd. Amends Code of Practices for Fair Disclosure
item.description:
KFin Technologies Ltd. has announced amendments to its Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information. The amendments are made to align the Code with the recent changes to the PIT Regulations. The updated Code is now available on the company's website for reference.

  • KFin Technologies Ltd. has amended its Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosure
  • The amendments are made to align the Code with the recent changes to the PIT Regulations
  • The updated Code is now available on the company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KFin Technologies Ltd | Category: Other

item.title: [NAZARA] Nazara Technologies Ltd. Calls for Extra-Ordinary General Meeting on May 01, 2026
item.description:
Nazara Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange about the Notice of Extra-Ordinary General Meeting ('EGM') to be held on May 01, 2026. The EGM will be conducted through Video Conference ('VC')/ Other Audio-Visual means ('OAVM') to transact the business(es) set forth in the Notice. The Company is seeking approval for increase in the limits to provide loan, guarantee or security or to make investment under Section 186 of the Companies Act, 2013. The proposed limit is INR 5000,00,00,000/- (Indian Rupees Five Thousand Crores Only). The Company also plans to approve the issuance of Warrants on Preferential Basis.

  • Nazara Technologies Limited calls for Extra-Ordinary General Meeting on May 01, 2026
  • Seeking approval for increase in the limits to provide loan, guarantee or security or to make investment under Section 186 of the Companies Act, 2013
  • Proposed limit is INR 5000,00,00,000/- (Indian Rupees Five Thousand Crores Only)
  • Plan to approve the issuance of Warrants on Preferential Basis

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nazara Technologies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SELAN] Antelopus Selan Energy Provides Clarification on Price Movement of Securities
item.description:
Antelopus Selan Energy Ltd, formerly known as Selan Exploration Technology Limited, has clarified a recent inquiry regarding the movement of their securities' prices. The company assures it regularly informs stock exchanges of any material information as required by Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and is currently compliant with no material events to disclose. The company believes the price movement is market-driven.

  • Antelopus Selan Energy clarifies price movement of securities
  • Company complies with Regulation 30 of SEBI regulations
  • No material events requiring disclosure at the moment
  • Price movement attributed to market forces

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SELAN EXPLORATION TECHNOLOGY LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [IITL] Industrial Investment Trust Ltd Appoints Mr. Mithilesh Kumar as CEO-NBFC
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Industrial Investment Trust Ltd has announced the appointment of Mr. Mithilesh Kumar as the Chief Executive Officer - NBFC (Non-Banking Financial Company) of the company, effective April 09, 2026. Mr. Kumar is a seasoned banking professional with over 20 years of experience in Retail Liabilities - Branch Banking and Sales. He is known for his excellent organizational, communication, and interpersonal skills, as well as his proficiency in IT. This appointment is in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Mr. Mithilesh Kumar appointed as CEO-NBFC of Industrial Investment Trust Ltd
  • Kumar has over 20 years of experience in Retail Liabilities - Branch Banking and Sales
  • He is known for his excellent organizational, communication, and interpersonal skills
  • Appointment is in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDUSTRIAL INVESTMENT TRUST LTD. | Category: Appointments

item.title: [SBRANDS] Sanghvi Brands Ltd Clarifies Price Movement Unrelated to Company Performance
item.description:
Sanghvi Brands Ltd has informed the Exchange(s) of all necessary events and informations that have a bearing on the operation/performance of the company, including all price sensitive informations as required under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Lisiting Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company confirmed that there is no impending announcement or withheld disclosure of any material information/event that may have a bearing on the price/volume behavior in the scrip of the company. The increase or spurt in the volume in the companies scrip is purely due to market conditions and is, apparently, market driven, on which the company has no control.

  • Sanghvi Brands Ltd has complied with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 by disclosing all necessary events and price sensitive information.
  • The company confirmed there is no impending announcement or withheld material information affecting the scrip's price or volume.
  • The price movement is attributed to market conditions and not company performance.
  • Sanghvi Brands Ltd prioritizes regulatory compliances and upholds the highest standards of corporate governance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sanghvi Brands Ltd | Category: Business Update
